idea-plugin.name: CADE IDE Bridge
idea-plugin.description: Connects IntelliJ-based IDEs to the CADE agent via the cade-ide-mcp adapter transport protocol. Exposes the editor's open files, selection, diagnostics, and workspace to CADE, and lets CADE apply edits, open files, run tasks, control the terminal, and drive the debugger.

action.description: Manually reconnect the CADE IDE bridge.
